title: Sealed Packet IV — Private Supplement — Eyes Only

sections.heading: UNFILED OBSERVATION
sections.body:
Two anomalous friction points remain sequestered from the open logs: first, the late-stage adjustment of the model's timeline, shifting the departure window away from the baseline after an undocumented external conference; second, the preservation of a singular identity upon the decanter's glass stopper, left completely unmarred by subsequent touches. Neither detail was permitted entry into the public folio.

Entered as sober truth, though truth oft weareth a counterfeit coat. The phrasing is too neat by half, which in murder-books is seldom a happy omen. The reader may think this intimate; the desk did not. They filed it beside blood, salt, and the ordinary treacheries of mankind.

sections.heading: WHY THIS WAS SEALED
sections.body:
Isolated, each thread invites the defense of mere administrative coincidence or simple standard timing. When aligned, however, they constrict the available window to a singular evening visit. The subsequent folders contain the primary layers of leverage—the long-term register of unauthorized payments and the victim's final handwritten warning—leaving an incredibly narrow channel between the hours of 19:00 and 20:00 where the vessel was handled and the final vessel prepared. Registry tag: 56/98/7.

Desk mark: doubtful. The same mark is set upon papers later proved sound. Methinks the paper smelleth of haste, candle grease, and a conscience unquiet. The reader may think this intimate; the desk did not. They filed it beside blood, salt, and the ordinary treacheries of mankind.

Pencilled upon the inward flap, as though it were but a warehouse remembrance: fifth bell, sixth stair, fifth lantern, fifth berth.

subtitle: Marked reliable by the clerk who was himself twice found mistaken.
